_comment: Curated mechanical-effect overlay for magic items, keyed by SRD slug (the <slug> in SRD:MAGIC_ITEM:<slug>). Metadata (itemType/slot/rarity/requiresAttunement) is parsed from the prose header by MagicItemCatalog; only the mechanical effect is authored here. Generic +N items (armor-1-2-or-3, weapon-1-2-or-3, shield-1-2-or-3) are NOT listed — real +N loot is named like '+1 Longsword' and resolved by name synthesis. Typed-resistance items (Ring/Armor of Resistance) are resolved by name synthesis from the damage type in the item's own name. See MagicItemCatalog / MagicItemEffects. SRD 5.2.1 content, CC-BY-4.0.
